title: wawapack quilted
body:
# wawapack quilted
<center>

![Kotaro (the wawa cat) with the Farmer's Delight, Runes, and Create mod icons surrounding it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7be7cb673a707e7716e05c7b220419f078cffe1.png)</center>

Includes:
- Create (alongside several addons)
- Farmer's Delight (alongside several addons with exclusive bugfixes for Farmer's Respite and Brewin' and Chewin')
- The RPG Series (Archers, Wizards, Paladins & Priests, Jewelry)
- Simply Skills
- FastMove
- BetterNether
- BetterEnd
- YUNG's mods
- Terralith
- A whole lot of QoL and performance mods
